methodology.mapping: normalized exact board/product names; ambiguous prefix matches remain no-official-coverage
methodology.ours: lilygo-skills source query for pinout and bus; concrete GPIO/IO assignments normalized to GPIO<n>
methodology.official: get_product_specs structured parameters and pinTables; no LLM
methodology.agreement: same normalized signal and at least one identical normalized GPIO value across official variants
methodology.verdict: lose on any disagreement or official pin signal missing from ours; win otherwise; endpoint/tool failure is unmeasurable
methodology.provenance: URL+SHA-256 and URL+line_range+SHA-256 are reported separately; shop links are not fact citations
